ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., CMOS, CCD) */,
  "datasheet" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pixel_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pixel pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pixel pattern (e.g., BGGR, GBRG) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pixel pattern */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the pixel pattern (e.g., 2x2, 3x3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "white_balance_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each white balance setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the white balance setting (e.g., WBBW0, WBBW1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the white balance setting */,
  "color_temperature" INTEGER /* Color temperature of the white balance setting (in Kelvin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bit_depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit depth */,
  "depth_name" TEXT /* Name of the bit depth (e.g., 8-bit, 10-bit, 12-bit, 14-bit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit depth */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value that can be represented by the bit depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pixel pattern */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the white balance setting */,
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bit depth */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES white_balance_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES pixel_patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_depth_id FOREIGN KEY ("depth_id") REFERENCES bit_depths ("depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., dB, %) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_config_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the configuration (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_config_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_config_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tags_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
